161.reason: [Error: When the first neighbor is deleted, this returns prematurely, skipping other neighbors and remaining queue elements. Should not return here; just skip the deleted vertex.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When the first neighbor is deleted, this returns prematurely, skipping other neighbors and remaining queue elements. Should not return here; just skip the deleted vertex.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When the first neighbor is deleted, this returns prematurely without processing other neighbors or the rest of the queue, causing incomplete BFS traversal.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  错误：当邻接点是被删除顶点时不应直接返回，应跳过。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: premature return causes BFS to stop entirely when the first neighbor of a dequeued vertex is deleted. Should instead skip this neighbor and continue to the next.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: prematurely terminates the entire BFS traversal when the first adjacent vertex is deleted. It should be removed or changed to skip the deleted vertex, as the subsequent loop already handles existence checks.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  This line incorrectly terminates the entire BFS traversal if the first neighbor of the current vertex is deleted. It should be removed because the subsequent loop already correctly checks and skips deleted vertices.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This return exits BFS prematurely when encountering a deleted vertex as neighbor, but should skip only that neighbor and continue processing others]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This return exits BFS prematurely if first neighbor is deleted; should skip only that neighbor, not entire BFS]
